completed_milestones.name: v1.5 Goblin Drain And Format Helper Closure
completed_milestones.summary: Completed the contributor overlay drain into Goblin and finished the tracked editor helper contract with backend-owned format, normalize, and cleanup actions.

tasks.name: Finish moving contributor scaffold and profile-policy checks into Goblin
Align platform scaffold status to the canonical Dev extension contract
Finish helper-aware save actions for tracked editor file types

completed_milestones.notes: Goblin now owns the contributor scaffold and policy overlay assertions, while the tracked editor helper labels now match actual backend-owned behavior per file type.

completed_milestones.name: v1.5 @dev Tracked Editor Round
completed_milestones.summary: Completed the tracked Dev Mode editor lane with nested navigation, guarded saves, format validation, and optional normalization across the canonical @dev payload.

tasks.name: Add tracked preview and edit support in the Dev Mode GUI
Add nested tracked browser navigation for ops, docs, and goblin roots
Validate tracked JSON, TOML, YAML, Python, shell, and Markdown content before save
Add optional tracked normalization for structured and text contributor files

completed_milestones.notes: The tracked editor lane is complete; follow-on helper and Goblin closure work landed in the dedicated v1.5 Goblin Drain And Format Helper Closure milestone.

completed_milestones.name: v1.5 @dev Provisioning Round
completed_milestones.summary: Closed the contributor workspace migration onto canonical dev/ops, dev/docs, and dev/goblin roots and removed the temporary compatibility layer.

tasks.name: Remove root and dev compatibility tracker files

completed_milestones.notes: Follow-on Goblin drain and tracked editor helper work is complete and recorded in the dedicated v1.5 Goblin Drain And Format Helper Closure milestone.
